title: Smāśāna Bhairavī Sādhana
description: The Śaiva-Śākta cremation-ground Bhairavī — the goddess of the *smasāna* (cremation ground) textual strand attested in the *Brahmayāmala Tantra* (Picumata), the *Jayadrathayāmala*, and the *Śāradā Tilaka*. She is the Bhairavī of the early Śaiva Mantramārga's Vidyāpīṭha — the cremation-ground goddess of the Kāpālika-Bhairava cultic complex. High caution — an antinomian Śaiva-Śākta rite of the crema
